candidate.name: Promote safe command transitions and braking
candidate.hypothesis: Command-boundary state, bounded delay-aware rate limiting, direction-specific yaw authority, and transition-specific phase/velocity feedback can make reversal, redirection, and braking settle without previewing future commands or changing the robot ABI.
candidate.expectedEffect: Eliminate every locked transition gate violation, retain command-tracking and spatial-generalization gates, and preserve the severe delayed-push case as visible non-gating stress evidence.

from.name: Spatial quadruped with motion command, force, IMU, and actuator history

to.name: Spatial quadruped with motion command, force, IMU, and actuator history
